case.title: STRICKLAND TRANSPORTATION CO., INC. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h4: STRICKLAND TRANSPORTATION CO., INC. v. UNITED STATES, (1968)
STRICKLAND TRANSPORTATION CO., INC. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF TEXAS. No. 839. Decided January 15, 1968.
opinion.p: Ralph W. Currie and Ewell H. Muse, Jr., for appellant.
Solicitor General Griswold, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Robert W. Ginnane and Nahum Litt for the United States et al., and Phillip Robinson for appellees Central Freight Lines, Inc., et al.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
KIRK, GOVERNOR OF FLORIDA, ET AL. v. GONG ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF FLORIDA. No. 872. Decided January 15, 1968.
Earl Faircloth, Attorney General of Florida, and T. T. Turnbull and Robert A. Chastain, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellants.
Thomas C. Britton, Stuart Simon, D. P. S. Paul and P. D. Thomson for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
